name: Turkey-Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Wagon Wheel or Spiral Pasta (uncooked)
8 oz Whole Kernel Corn OR 1 cup Frozen Corn Kernels
1 small Red Bell Pepper, cut into 1/2-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the pasta, turkey, corn, zucchini, tomato, red bell pepper, and cilantro in a large bowl.
2. In a small bowl, combine the picante sauce, dressing, and salt (if using). Mix well to blend.
3. Pour the dressing over the pasta mixture and toss gently to coat all of the ingredients.
4. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
5. Serve with additional picante sauce, if desired.
